---
id: execute-device-trait
title: "Control Devices by Traits"
description: "Control devices by traits. You can perform the following operations:"
sidebar_label: "Control Devices by Traits"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Control Devices by Traits"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/trait/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Control devices by traits. You can perform the following operations:
- Update device attributes (such as switch, temperature, etc. For functionCode and traitCode, please refer to the /devices/definitions interface)
- Reconnect device to a new room (functionCode="EndpointLabel", traitCode="EndpointRoom")
- Rename device (functionCode="EndpointLabel", traitCode="EndpointName")


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"Access token obtained via authorization."},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"App ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"Key ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"Random string, should be different for each request."},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"Request timestamp in milliseconds."},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"Language, defaults to English. Supports 'zh' and 'en'."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCode","value"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"Endpoint ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"Function code, e.g.:\n- Output（Switch control）\n- EndpointLabel（Device rename/room change）\n"},"traitCode":{"type":"string","description":"Trait code, e.g.:\n- OnOff（Switch）\n- EndpointRoom（Device location）\n- EndpointName（Device name）\n"},"value":{"description":"The target value to be set. The type is consistent with the parameter.type of the trait to be controlled.","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"TraitExecuteItem"}}},"title":"TraitExecuteRequest"},"examples":{"executeOnOff":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","value":true}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Request succeeded. However, it does not mean all trait values were set successfully.<br />A code value of 0 indicates that at least some operations succeeded; a non-zero code indicates all failed.<br />If data is present, it indicates the set of traits that failed to be set; if not, all traits were set successfully.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v4"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","description":"The array elements are the traits that failed to be executed.","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCode","code","message"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer"},"functionCode":{"type":"string"},"traitCode":{"type":"string"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Error message"}},"title":"TraitExecuteResult"}}}}],"example":{"type":"ExecuteTraitResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000009","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"device-001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","code":1103,"message":"device offline"}]},"title":"TraitExecuteResponse"},"examples":{"partialFailed":{"value":{"type":"ExecuteTraitResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf7","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","code":1103,"message":"device offline"}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request Parameter Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v4","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx cannot be empty"},"description":"Error response.
